title: Site update: More versions
description: Added way more clients and some new modpacks to the launcher!
notes: Added the WASM versions of some clients
Added 7 new modpacks and their WASM versions

title: Site update: Customizable
description: Added customizable launcher options, credits, settings, more memory options, and updated code! (made by irv77)
notes: Added customizable launcher options, allowing users to create their own name and icon.
Added credits screen, displaying everybody who has contributed.
Added the settings screen, allowing users to customize the launcher, and learn info.
Implemented more memory on choices made inside of the launcher.
Updated games, fixed bugs, modified css.

title: App update: Offline app!
description: Made the app for EaglerLauncher work offline
notes: Made the app for EaglerLauncher work offline (except some clients that use iframe, those still need wi-fi)

title: App update: executable support!
description: Made executable apps for Linux, MacOS and Windows
notes: Made executable apps for Linux, MacOS and Windows

title: Site Update: Eagler Optimizations
description: Added skin editor, new clients and optimized eagler launcher

title: Site Update: Eagler Launcher
description: Added credits, removed unused features and unstable versions and updated some code
notes: Removed Flamedogo's mobile ui because it did not work

title: Site Update: Modded
description: Added patch notes, bug fixes, and integrated mods!
notes: Added the mod screen, which allows users to select mods, and it'll be added to their eaglerforge launcher. Will override mods added in by user inside of launcher.
Added the news screen, it displays recent updates to the website, and launcher builds.
Fixed a bug of unable to scroll with to many launchers selected.

title: Site Update: Memorized
description: Organized/updated code, added memory options, more games and installations!
notes: Implemented memory for options selected inside of launcher.
Added wider range of game versions.
Removed bulk code for sleeker function/look.
Organize structure of project for future growth.

title: Eaglercraft 1.8.8
description: Eaglercraft 1.8.8 is released by lax1dude and aayunami2000

title: Site Update: W.A.S.M.
description: added the WebAssembly GC editions of eaglercraft

title: Site Update: CYA CSS
description: Come back soon for full log!

title: Ampler Launcher Release
description: this was when the orignal ampler launcher was released. eagler launcher is a fork of ampler launcher.
